Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: dougsimpsoncodes
Message:
Fix stale data issue: Fresh Supabase client + PostgREST probe

- Modified /api/admin/calls to create fresh Supabase client per request
  - Moved client creation into GET handler (no module-level caching)
  - Added auth: { persistSession: false } to prevent session caching
  - Added autoRefreshToken: false
  - Kept custom fetch with timestamp cache-busting

- Created /api/admin/debug/calls-probe endpoint
  - Direct PostgREST call bypassing Supabase JS client
  - Returns restCount and restMostRecentStart for comparison
  - Helps diagnose if stale data is client-side or database-side

- Updated vercel.json
  - Added maxDuration: 30 for admin API routes
  - Confirmed region pinning to iad1 (matches Supabase location)

- Added verification script: scripts/verify-stale-data-fix.sh
  - Deploys to production
  - Tests both endpoints
  - Compares results to identify where staleness occurs

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: dougsimpsoncodes
Message:
Fix CI build: Move Supabase client initialization to runtime

- Move createClient() call from module level to inside POST handler
- Prevents build-time initialization when env vars aren't available
- Add security rule to .claude/CLAUDE.md: never hardcode secrets
- Redact exposed Resend API key from deployment docs

Fixes #144

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Discovered a potential authorization token provided in a curl command header, which could compromise the curl accessed resource.
Author: dougsimpsoncodes
Message:
Add comprehensive marketing funnel analysis system

Features:
- Three-Metric Funnel dashboard (Impressions → Clicks → Unique Customers)
- Customer deduplication by phone number across calls + forms
- Call attribution algorithm (direct match + time correlation)
- ROI dashboard with cost per unique customer
- Lead Management CRM with revenue tracking
- Microsoft Ads (Bing) integration
- Google Search Console (organic) integration
- Automated syncs via Vercel cron jobs

Database migrations:
- Call attribution fields on ringcentral_calls
- Microsoft Ads performance tables
- Google Search Console tables
- UTM tracking fields on leads
- CRM fields (quote_amount, revenue_amount, close_date, notes, status)

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: dougsimpsoncodes
Message:
Add CI/CD security automation and secret rotation guide

**CI/CD Improvements:**
- Add GitHub Actions workflow with gitleaks, dependency audit, and header checks
- Enhance gitleaks config with comprehensive allowlisting and Pink Auto Glass specific patterns
- Add automated security header verification for pages and APIs
- Fail builds on high/critical npm audit findings

**Documentation:**
- Create SECRET_ROTATION_GUIDE.md with step-by-step key rotation process
- Include Supabase, form security secrets, and communication service rotation
- Provide verification checklist and rollback procedures

**Security Enforcement:**
- Gitleaks blocks commits/PRs with secrets
- npm audit blocks builds with vulnerable dependencies
- CSP/HSTS/XFO headers verified in CI
- Pre-commit hook already configured (local enforcement)

**Next Steps:**
- User must rotate Supabase keys in Vercel (guide provided)
- Convert OG image SVG to PNG
- Implement form token API with rate limiting

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: dougsimpsoncodes
Message:
Security improvements and pre-production audit

- Add form integrity tokens with payload hash binding
- Add SECURITY DEFINER RPC functions for jti verification
- Add salt rotation strategy with versioning
- Update .env.example with new security variables
- Add comprehensive security documentation
- Complete pre-production security audit (PASSED)

Security audit results:
✅ No hardcoded secrets
✅ No credentials in git history
✅ SQL injection protected
✅ Proper .gitignore configuration
✅ All secrets use environment variables

Files added:
- src/lib/formSecurity.ts
- supabase/migrations/20250119000000_submission_abuse_detection.sql
- docs/SECURITY_IMPLEMENTATION_NOTES.md
- docs/SECURITY_ROTATION.md
- SECURITY.md
- PRE_PRODUCTION_SECURITY_AUDIT.md
- DEPLOYMENT_CHECKLIST.md
- scripts/deploy-production.sh

Status: Production-ready

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
